title: 舌戦開幕！賛美の湯 1話 幽霊旅館？

script.text: （今、ⅢXはライブツアーで各地を回っている）

translations.en: ( Right now‚ IIIX is on a live tour‚ traveling from place to place. )

script.text: （彼女達は人気を取り戻しつつあって、会場も満員……）

translations.en:
( The girls are gradually regaining their popularity‚
and the venues are packed… )

script.text: （……なんだが、様子がおかしい。もう宿を出ないと）

translations.en:
（…Something's not right‚ though.
We need to check out of the hotel soon.）

script.text: （いけないのに、三人ともまだ起きてこない）

translations.en:
（But the three of them haven't woken up yet‚
even though they should have by now.）

script.text: （これは……荷物はめちゃくちゃに散らかってるし）

translations.en: （This is… The luggage is scattered everywhere messily.）

script.text: （あの仲が悪いスリクスが、抱き合って寝てるだと！？）

translations.en:
（That IIIX‚ known for their bad relationships‚
are sleeping while hugging each other!?）

script.text: みなさん、起きて下さい

translations.en: Everyone‚ please wake up.

script.text: 昨日の夜、一体何があったんですか！？

translations.en: What on earth happened last night?

script.text: ――前日、午後

translations.en: ――Prior day‚ afternoon

script.text: ちょっと～、何このボロっちい宿

translations.en: Ugh‚ what's with this shabby inn?

script.text: kana、ツアー真っ最中のアイドル様なんですけど？

translations.en: Kana‚ I'm an idol in the middle of a tour‚ you know?

script.text: あなたが「温泉入りたい、でないと殺す」とか

translations.en:
It's because you said "I want to go to a hot spring‚
or I'll kill you‚" didn't you?

script.text: わがまま言ったからでしょ

translations.en: It's all because of your selfishness.

script.text: 温泉と、一泊あたりの予算の両方を満たすのが

translations.en:
Considering both the hot spring
and the budget for one night's stay‚

script.text: この宿しかなかったんでしょうね……

translations.en: This was probably the only inn available…

script.text: これだから、ちっちゃい事務所ってさあ～！

translations.en: This is why I can't stand small agencies!

script.text: ……あ、なんか天井のとこお札まで貼ってあるし

translations.en: …Oh‚ there are even talismans stuck to the ceiling.

script.text: ボロいし、いかにもじめ～っとしてるし

translations.en: It's run-down and feels all damp and chilly.

script.text: この宿、もしかして心霊スポットかなんかじゃない？

translations.en: Is this place some kind of haunted spot or something?

script.text: 何、馬鹿なこと言ってるの

translations.en: What are you talking about? That's ridiculous.

script.text: このご時世、幽霊なんている訳ないでしょ

translations.en: In this day and age‚ there's no such thing as ghosts.

script.text: ふ～ん。幽霊が怖いとか

translations.en: Hmmm. Being scared of ghosts‚

script.text: 山田さんってば、か～わいい～

translations.en: Yamada-san‚ you're sooo cute~

script.text: だから毎度毎度、山田って呼ぶなってば！！

translations.en: For the umpteenth time‚ stop calling me Yamada!!

script.text: それと別に怖がってなんかいないわよ！

translations.en: And I'm not scared at all!

script.text: これだから経済誌読まないお子様は困るわ

translations.en:
This is why kids who don't read
financial magazines are troublesome.

script.text: 歴史のある旅館の再生ビジネスが今流行ってるんだから

translations.en: The business of reviving old inns is trending right now.

script.text: この宿だって、建物は古いけど立地は悪くないし

translations.en: Even if this place is old‚ its location isn't bad.

script.text: うまくやって儲け話に一口噛めないかしら

translations.en: Maybe we could get in on a lucrative deal?

script.text: あっそ、勝手に出資して大損すれば

translations.en: Sure‚ go ahead and invest‚ and then take a huge loss.

script.text: ……はあ

translations.en: …sigh.

script.text: ……二人ともやめなさい、宿の人に聞こえるでしょう

translations.en: …Both of you‚ please stop. People in the inn can hear you.

script.text: ともかく、チェックアウトは明日の朝八時よ

translations.en: Anyway‚ check-out is at 8 o'clock tomorrow morning.

script.text: くれぐれも寝坊しないようにね

translations.en: Be sure not to oversleep.

script.text: まだ夕方だし、結構時間あるなー……

translations.en: It's still early evening‚ so we have plenty of time…

script.text: 私は、一昨日のライブの動画を見直さないと

translations.en:
I need to review the video from
the day before yesterday's live performance.

script.text: 完璧なステージのために妥協は出来ないわ

translations.en: I can't compromise for a perfect stage.

script.text: よろしくね～、miho

translations.en: See you later‚ Miho.

script.text: 私は、露天風呂に行ってくるわ

translations.en: I'm going to the open-air bath.

script.text: え～、せっかくkanaが入ろうと思ったのに！

translations.en: Huh‚ I was just about to take a bath!

script.text: あんたに取られるとか最悪！！

translations.en: It would be the worst if you stole it from me!!

script.text: franと一緒に入るとか絶対イヤだし

translations.en: I absolutely don't want to bathe with Fran.

script.text: kanaは、SNSのネタでも探してくるかあ～

translations.en: Maybe I'll look for SNS content instead~

script.text: ……二人とも、あまり客室から出ないでちょうだい

translations.en: …Both of you‚ please don't leave the guest room too much.

script.text: ツアー中なんだから、恥を晒して回らないで

translations.en:
We're in the middle of a tour‚ so don't expose
yourselves to unnecessary attention.

script.text: よからぬ噂を流されでもしたらどうなるか

translations.en: You know what might happen if rumors start spreading.

script.text: 私達は分かってるはずよ

translations.en: We should understand that.

script.text: あーはいはい。……それじゃあ、また明日の朝に

translations.en: Alright‚ alright… Well then‚ see you tomorrow morning.

script.text: お互い、有意義な時間を過ごしましょ

translations.en: Let's spend a meaningful time together.

script.text: ふーん、ふーん……

translations.en: Hmmm… hmmm…

script.text: kanaは文句言ってたけど、いい雰囲気の宿じゃない

translations.en: Kana was complaining‚ but this inn has a nice atmosphere.

script.text: 滅多にこんなとこ来ないし

translations.en: We don't come to places like this often.

script.text: ツアーで疲れ溜まってるし、今夜はゆっくり……

translations.en: We're tired from the tour‚ so tonight we can relax…

script.text: ……うわ、この床凄い音するわね

translations.en: …Oh‚ this floor makes quite a noise.

script.text: いくら歴史があると言っても、限度ってもんがあるわ

translations.en: No matter how historic it is‚ there's a limit to it.

script.text: やっぱり、古いだけでもダメだわ

translations.en: I guess being old alone isn't good enough.

script.text: ちゃんとコンサル入れて改修するのが大前提ね

translations.en: We must renovate with proper consultation.

script.text: ああもう、ここの床もギシッって……

translations.en: Oh‚ come on‚ this floor too…

script.text: いえ、違うわ。向こうの方で、鳴った気がする……

translations.en: No‚ it's different. I think I heard it from over there…

script.text: ねえちょっと、誰かいるの？

translations.en: Hey‚ is someone there?

script.text: いるなら、出てきてちゃんと私と話をしたらどうよ！

translations.en: If there is‚ how about coming out and talking to me properly!

script.text: ……何よ、何よあれ

translations.en: …What is it‚ what is it?

script.text: あそこに人！？　人みたいなのが！？

translations.en: There's a person over there!? Something like a person!?

script.text: 何これ、私に何か言ってる……？

translations.en: What's this‚ are they saying something to me…?
Ah…!!

script.text: 私は何も悪くない、悪いことはしてないわよ！！

translations.en:
I haven't done anything wrong‚
I haven't done anything bad!!

script.text: あはははは、それでkana達を呼び出したって

translations.en: Ahahaha‚ so you called kana out for that?

script.text: こと！？　山田さんビビり過ぎでマジウケる～

translations.en: That's hilarious! Yamada-san‚ you're way too jumpy~

script.text: だから、私、本当に見たんだってば！！

translations.en: I'm telling you‚ I really saw it!!

script.text: 変な足音が追いかけてきて、後ろにすーっと白いのが！

translations.en:
Strange footsteps were chasing me‚
and then a white thing appeared behind me!

script.text: そう言われても、「幽霊がいた」なんて

translations.en: Even if you say that‚ it's not something

script.text: すぐに信じられる訳ないでしょう

translations.en: I can immediately believe‚ like "there was a ghost."

script.text: あ～はいはい、貴重な経験が出来て良かったね

translations.en: Oh well‚ it's good that you had a valuable experience.

script.text: あ、SNSにも書いておこうっと

translations.en: Oh‚ I should post it on SNS too!

script.text: 『franが幽霊見たんだって、びっくり！！

translations.en: "Fran saw a ghost‚ it's shocking!!"

script.text: kanaは霊感ないから、ちょっとだけ羨ましいな～』

translations.en: "Kana is a bit jealous because she doesn't have a sixth sense~"

script.text: ちょっと、人を勝手にネタにしないでよね！？

translations.en: Hey‚ don't just use me for material‚ okay!?

script.text: この宿に、本当に変なものがいるにしても

translations.en: Even if there really is something strange in this inn‚

script.text: どうせ今夜だけのことだし、我慢してちょうだい

translations.en: it's just for tonight‚ so please endure it.

script.text: お子様じゃないんだからさ～

translations.en: You're not a child‚ you know~

script.text: あまりわがまま言うもんじゃないよ、山田さん

translations.en: Don't be too selfish‚ Yamada-san.

script.text: あんた達は見てないから、好き勝手言えるのよ！！

translations.en: You guys didn't see it‚ so you can say whatever you want!!

script.text: こんな所で一晩過ごすなんて、冗談じゃないわ

translations.en: Spending the night in a place like this is no joke…

script.text: ……こうなったら……！！

translations.en: …If it's come to this…!!
